steps.title: Read points from the graph
steps.content: The graph passes through $(0,0)$ and $(1,2)$. This means the distance starts at $0$ feet and increases by $2$ feet during the first $1$ minute.

steps.title: Use the constant rate
steps.content: Because the graph is a straight line through the origin, the distance is the rate times the number of minutes.

steps.title: Write the line equation
steps.content:
The slope is
$$\frac{2-0}{1-0}=2$$
Since the line passes through the origin, the equation is
$$d=2m$$
The answer is A.
